title: Platystele stenostachya
taxonomy: Platystele stenostachya is classified as an orchid species, specifically within the subtribe Pleurothallidinae of the orchid family (Orchidaceae). It belongs to the genus Platystele, which is characterized by its small, delicate flowers. The species is native to Central and South America, adding to its unique and specialized classification. Platystele stenostachya is further categorized as a terrestrial orchid, indicating its growth habit on the ground. This classification highlights the species' specific characteristics and adaptations.
